build.beforeBuildCommand: npm --prefix ../ui ci && npm --prefix ../ui run build -- --mode desktop

security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:8788; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'

bundle.shortDescription: A focused local workspace for MSP operations
bundle.longDescription: WAIT Local Agent keeps the dashboard and local operations workspace together on the user's computer.
